products.name: Fresh Oyster Mushrooms
products.description: Premium hand-picked oyster mushrooms, grown locally in controlled environments. Known for their delicate texture and mild, slightly sweet flavor. These mushrooms are harvested at peak freshness and delivered within 24 hours. Perfect for stir-fries, soups, pasta dishes, and grilling. Rich in protein, fiber, and essential vitamins.
products.shortDescription: Fresh, locally-grown oyster mushrooms with a delicate flavor
products.storageInstructions: Store in refrigerator at 2-4°C. Use within 5-7 days of purchase. Keep in original packaging or paper bag to maintain freshness.
products.preparationTips: Gently clean with damp cloth. Trim tough stems. Best when sautéed, grilled, or added to soups and stir-fries. Do not wash until ready to use.
products.seoTitle: Fresh Oyster Mushrooms - Premium Local Grown | MASH
products.seoDescription: Buy fresh oyster mushrooms grown locally in Pangasinan. Hand-picked daily, organic certified. Perfect for cooking. Order online today!
products.seoKeywords: oyster mushrooms, fresh mushrooms, organic mushrooms, local mushrooms, Philippines

products.name: Fresh Shiitake Mushrooms
products.description: Premium fresh shiitake mushrooms with rich umami flavor and meaty texture. Grown in controlled indoor farms using sustainable practices. These mushrooms are known for their distinctive earthy aroma and versatility in cooking. Excellent source of B vitamins, copper, and selenium. Perfect for Asian cuisine, risotto, stir-fries, and mushroom broths.
products.shortDescription: Meaty shiitake mushrooms with rich umami flavor
products.storageInstructions: Refrigerate immediately at 2-4°C. Best consumed within 5 days. Store in breathable container.
products.preparationTips: Remove stems if tough. Slice caps evenly. Excellent for stir-fries, soups, and grilling. Stems can be used for broth.
products.seoTitle: Fresh Shiitake Mushrooms - Organic Premium Quality | MASH
products.seoDescription: Premium fresh shiitake mushrooms with rich umami flavor. Locally grown, organic certified. Perfect for Asian cooking.
products.seoKeywords: shiitake mushrooms, fresh shiitake, umami, organic mushrooms, cooking mushrooms

products.name: Fresh Enoki Mushrooms
products.description: Delicate enoki mushrooms with long white stems and tiny caps. Mild, slightly fruity flavor with a crisp, tender texture. Grown in pristine conditions using modern cultivation techniques. Popular in Asian cuisine, especially Japanese and Korean dishes. Great for hot pots, soups, salads, and stir-fries. Low in calories, high in antioxidants.
products.shortDescription: Delicate white enoki mushrooms, perfect for Asian cuisine
products.storageInstructions: Keep refrigerated at 2-4°C. Use within 4-5 days. Store in original packaging.
products.preparationTips: Cut off root cluster. Separate strands gently. Add to hot pots, soups, or stir-fries at the end of cooking to maintain crispness.
products.seoTitle: Fresh Enoki Mushrooms - Premium Asian Mushrooms | MASH
products.seoDescription: Delicate fresh enoki mushrooms perfect for hot pots and Asian cuisine. Locally grown, fresh delivery.
products.seoKeywords: enoki mushrooms, asian mushrooms, hot pot mushrooms, fresh enoki

products.name: King Oyster Mushrooms
products.description: Premium king oyster mushrooms (Pleurotus eryngii) with thick, meaty stems and small caps. Largest of the oyster mushroom family, known for exceptional texture similar to scallops or abalone when cooked. Mild, savory flavor with umami notes. Excellent for grilling, roasting, pan-searing, and vegetarian steaks. High in protein, ergothioneine antioxidant, and beta-glucans.
products.shortDescription: Thick, meaty king oyster mushrooms with scallop-like texture
products.storageInstructions: Refrigerate at 2-4°C. Best used within 7 days. Keep dry and in breathable packaging.
products.preparationTips: Slice stems into thick rounds or lengthwise. Score surface for better seasoning absorption. Perfect for grilling or pan-searing like scallops.
products.seoTitle: King Oyster Mushrooms - Premium Meaty Texture | MASH
products.seoDescription: Premium king oyster mushrooms with scallop-like texture. Perfect for grilling and vegetarian dishes. Organic certified.
products.seoKeywords: king oyster mushrooms, eryngii, meaty mushrooms, vegetarian protein, premium mushrooms

products.name: White Button Mushrooms
products.description: Classic white button mushrooms (Agaricus bisporus) - the most popular mushroom variety worldwide. Mild, earthy flavor that complements any dish. Grown in nutrient-rich compost using traditional methods. Versatile for raw salads, pizza toppings, soups, sautés, and grilling. Low in calories, good source of selenium, potassium, and B vitamins. Perfect for everyday cooking.
products.shortDescription: Classic white button mushrooms, mild and versatile
products.storageInstructions: Store in refrigerator at 2-4°C. Use within 5-7 days. Keep in paper bag or original packaging.
products.preparationTips: Wipe clean with damp cloth. Use whole, sliced, or quartered. Great raw in salads or cooked in any dish.
products.seoTitle: White Button Mushrooms - Fresh & Versatile | MASH
products.seoDescription: Fresh white button mushrooms perfect for any recipe. Locally grown, delivered fresh. Great for salads, pizzas, and cooking.
products.seoKeywords: white button mushrooms, fresh mushrooms, cooking mushrooms, versatile mushrooms

products.name: Portobello Mushrooms
products.description: Large, mature portobello mushrooms with rich, deep flavor and substantial meaty texture. Fully grown cremini mushrooms with opened caps. Perfect for grilling whole as vegetarian burgers, stuffing, roasting, or slicing for hearty dishes. Dark gills provide intense savory flavor. Excellent source of antioxidants, copper, and selenium.
products.shortDescription: Large portobello mushrooms, perfect for grilling and stuffing
products.storageInstructions: Refrigerate at 2-4°C. Best within 5 days. Store cap-side down to prevent moisture accumulation.
products.preparationTips: Remove stem, scrape out gills if desired. Brush with oil and grill cap-side down. Perfect for mushroom burgers.
products.seoTitle: Portobello Mushrooms - Large Grilling Mushrooms | MASH
products.seoDescription: Large portobello mushrooms perfect for grilling and stuffing. Great for vegetarian burgers. Organic certified.

products.name: Premium Dried Shiitake Mushrooms
products.description: Premium grade dried shiitake mushrooms (Lentinula edodes) with concentrated umami flavor. Carefully selected, sun-dried to preserve nutrients and intensify taste. Rehydrates quickly to plump, tender texture. Essential ingredient for Asian cuisine, broths, soups, stir-fries, and braised dishes. Long shelf life makes it perfect for pantry staples. Rich in vitamin D, B vitamins, and immune-boosting compounds.
products.shortDescription: Premium dried shiitake with intense umami flavor
products.storageInstructions: Store in cool, dry place away from direct sunlight. Keeps for 12-18 months. Reseal bag after opening.
products.preparationTips: Soak in warm water for 20-30 minutes until soft. Reserve soaking liquid for broths. Trim and discard tough stems.
products.seoDescription: Premium dried shiitake mushrooms with rich umami flavor. Perfect for Asian cooking and soups. Long shelf life.
products.seoKeywords: dried shiitake, dried mushrooms, umami, asian cooking, pantry essentials

products.name: Dried Wood Ear Mushrooms
products.description: Premium dried wood ear mushrooms (Auricularia auricula-judae) with unique crunchy, gelatinous texture. Popular in Chinese, Vietnamese, and Thai cuisine. Expands significantly when rehydrated. Mild flavor that absorbs other ingredients well. Perfect for hot and sour soup, stir-fries, salads, and dumplings. Rich in iron, protein, and dietary fiber. Known for blood circulation benefits.
products.shortDescription: Crunchy wood ear mushrooms for Asian cuisine
products.storageInstructions: Store in airtight container in cool, dry place. Shelf life of 24 months when properly stored.
products.preparationTips: Soak in warm water for 15-20 minutes. Expands 8-10 times original size. Rinse well before use. Slice thinly for best texture.
products.seoTitle: Dried Wood Ear Mushrooms - Authentic Asian Ingredient | MASH
products.seoDescription: Premium dried wood ear mushrooms for Asian cooking. Perfect texture for soups and stir-fries. Long shelf life.
products.seoKeywords: wood ear mushrooms, black fungus, dried mushrooms, asian ingredients

products.name: Dried Porcini Mushrooms
products.description: Premium imported dried porcini mushrooms (Boletus edulis) with intense, nutty, earthy flavor. Highly prized in Italian and French cuisine. Strong aromatic scent and meaty texture when rehydrated. Perfect for risotto, pasta sauces, soups, and gravy. The soaking liquid makes excellent mushroom stock. Contains high levels of antioxidants, selenium, and vitamin D.
products.shortDescription: Premium dried porcini with intense earthy flavor
products.storageInstructions: Store in airtight container away from light and moisture. Best quality for 12 months.
products.preparationTips: Soak in hot water for 20 minutes. Strain soaking liquid through coffee filter to remove grit - use for cooking. Chop rehydrated mushrooms.

products.seoDescription: Authentic Italian dried porcini mushrooms. Perfect for risotto and pasta. Premium gourmet quality.

products.name: Oyster Mushroom Growing Kit - Beginner Friendly
products.description: Complete oyster mushroom growing kit for home cultivation. Perfect for beginners and urban gardeners. Contains pre-colonized substrate block ready to fruit. No special equipment needed - just water twice daily. Harvest fresh oyster mushrooms in 7-10 days. 2-3 harvest cycles from one kit. Educational and fun for families. Teaches sustainable food production. Includes detailed instructions and growing tips.
products.shortDescription: Grow your own oyster mushrooms at home in 7-10 days
products.expectedYield: 500-750g fresh mushrooms per kit over 2-3 harvests
products.storageInstructions: Store in cool place until ready to grow. Start within 2 weeks of receipt for best results.
products.preparationTips: Remove from packaging, cut X-shaped opening, mist 2-3 times daily. Keep in indirect light. Harvest when caps begin to flatten.
